name: not_order_mixed_upd_promote
drl: rule NE when not E0() P() then end
_finding: D-146 mixed-regime `not E0() P()`: a POST-BLOCKER EPOCH-0 INITIAL (P2) UPDATED at all — even same-segment (no arrival between) — PROMOTES out of the initials-last tail into the segment's updates slot, firing between the epoch inserts and the tail: [3,2,1] (vs [3,2,1] tail-only when untouched — here the promotion is pinned by the update; without it P2 still tails). Epoch->=1 inserts updated same-segment do NOT promote (D-143 nb801x0). Spec: model_check_notorder_b.py MODEL=seg2.
